peripheral_requirement.purpose: 3-phase center-aligned complementary PWM using eGTM Cluster 1 ATOM0 CH0/CH1/CH2 with 1 µs deadtime via CDTM/DTM, synchronized start and duty updates, and a period ISR toggling LED P13.0

egtm.complementary_generation: CDTM (hardware dead-time, complementary low-side from each HS channel). Configure deadtime using the IfxEgtm_Dtm API on TC4xx (e.g., initialize DTM/CDTM with IfxEgtm_Dtm_init and program deadtime in FXCLK0 ticks via an IfxEgtm_Dtm deadtime setter), or program the DTM/CDTM registers directly (e.g., DTMx/CTMx DTV and DTS). Target deadtime = 1 µs.

led.function: Toggle in eGTM PWM period ISR

status_flags.name: pwm_initialized
status_flags.set_when: Initialization completes successfully (e.g., after initEgtmAtom3phInv configures EGTM clocks, ATOM channels, AGC, pin mapping, and CDTM/DTM).
status_flags.cleared_when: Deinitialization, reconfiguration failure, or any fatal error during init.
status_flags.handling: Duty updates and PWM start are permitted only when true.

status_flags.name: update_in_progress
status_flags.set_when: updateEgtmAtom3phInvDuty writes new compare values to shadow registers and issues the AGC global update trigger; remains true until the next period boundary when shadow-to-active transfer completes.
status_flags.cleared_when: After the period boundary shadow transfer completes (confirmed in the PWM period ISR).
status_flags.handling: Reject or queue additional duty updates while true to preserve atomic 3-phase updates.

status_flags.name: dtm_configured
status_flags.set_when: CDTM/DTM is enabled and deadtime for all pairs is programmed for 1 µs at FXCLK0 using the IfxEgtm_Dtm API (e.g., init and deadtime setter) or by writing DTM/CDTM registers (DTV/DTS) and verifying enable bits.
status_flags.cleared_when: CDTM/DTM is disabled, reconfigured to an invalid value, or an error_clock occurs.
status_flags.handling: Do not enable PWM outputs unless this flag is true.

status_flags.name: error_pinmap
status_flags.set_when: Requested TOUT mapping for P20.8/9/10/11/12/13 is not available for EGTM Cluster 1 ATOM0 CH0/1/2, conflicts with another peripheral, or pin configuration fails.
status_flags.cleared_when: A valid, conflict-free pin mapping is applied and verified.
status_flags.handling: Abort initialization/start; keep outputs disabled and report the fault.

status_flags.name: error_clock
status_flags.set_when: EGTM GCLK or FXCLK0 is disabled/not running, or FXCLK0 differs from device_configuration.clock_requirements.target_fxclk0_hz by more than the tolerated margin.
status_flags.cleared_when: Required clocks are enabled and within the expected frequency range.
status_flags.handling: Abort initialization and prevent PWM start; reconfigure clocks before retry.

status_flags.name: error_channel
status_flags.set_when: Requested channels are not available/reserved, group assignment is invalid for AGC, or API receives an invalid duty array (NULL or values outside [0.0..1.0]).
status_flags.cleared_when: Valid channels are allocated and the next update call provides valid inputs.
status_flags.handling: Do not apply the update; clamp outputs to a safe state and signal error.

timing_requirements.synchronized_duty_update: period (shadow transfer via AGC global update trigger for ATOM; TGC is for TOM and not used here)

peripheral_usage.Wdt: Disable CPU and Safety watchdogs during init
